curation_notes: The patch commit (97d2316) adds a NULL check after the PKCS12_create call in serialize_key_and_certificates_to_pkcs12. Only one non-test source file was changed (src/cryptography/hazmat/backends/openssl/backend.py). The location was derived directly from the patch diff, which shows the fix adding a check for p12 == self._ffi.NULL and raising a ValueError. The advisory explicitly describes the conditions: a mismatched key/certificate pair combined with an hmac_hash override triggers the NULL pointer dereference.
